extracted_information: Veratad offers a flexible and secure online age verification system named Veratad VX, an orchestration platform designed to help businesses comply with age-restricted content regulations and prevent fraud without hindering customer experience. It allows for the creation of custom age verification journeys without custom code, utilizing various data sources and methods. The system supports deployment flexibility and allows for custom business rules and certainty thresholds, ensuring customer data privacy and security. Veratad helps businesses meet regulatory compliance requirements such as KYC, FFEIC BSA/AML, OFAC, PEPS, CCPA, GDPR, and COPPA.

pricing.status: Not specified in the provided content

features.name: Flexible, Secure Age Verification
features.description: Orchestrate customer age checks and ensure compliance with industry's most flexible online age verification solution.

features.name: Custom Age Verification Journeys
features.description: Ability to orchestrate custom age verification journeys without custom code.

features.name: Multi-Source Verification
features.description: Utilizes data, documents, biometrics, reusables, and more.

features.name: Flexible Deployment Options
features.description: Offers various deployment choices to fit business needs.

features.name: Custom Business Rules & Thresholds
features.description: Allows setting custom business rules and certainty thresholds for verification.

features.name: Data Privacy & Security
features.description: Ensures customer data is completely private and secure.

features.name: Defensible Due Diligence & Fraud Prevention
features.description: Provides a smarter form of verification for fraud prevention.

features.name: Proprietary Privacy Tool
features.description: Prompts customers to verify age/identity via a mathematical equation based on their Social Security Number, without handling the real SSN.

features.name: No-Code Journey Builder
features.description: Build bespoke age verification journeys in minutes without a single line of code, using a drag-and-drop orchestration experience.

features.name: Compliance Support
features.description: Helps comply with KYC, FFEIC BSA/AML, OFAC, PEPS, CCPA, GDPR, COPPA. Dynamically sets age thresholds based on customer location.

features.name: Industry Support
features.description: Trusted leader for online gaming, retail, eCommerce, and age-restricted content (tobacco, vape, cannabis, online casinos).

features.name: Customizable Verification via API
features.description: Offers customizable verification through a single API.

features.name: Identity Data Verification
features.description: Verifies over 5 billion citizens with minimal friction and high certainty.

features.name: ID Document Verification (DCAMS)
features.description: Product for intake, management, and verification of ID documents (e.g., driver’s licenses) with optional human review.

features.name: Smart 2FA℠
features.description: Exclusive two-factor authentication combining identity verification and 2FA for highest surety during onboarding.

features.name: Reusable Digital Identity Verification (IDMax)
features.description: Streamlines and secures onboarding leveraging reusable digital identity credentials.

features.name: Biometrics
features.description: Face-based biometrics with certified liveness detection to match individuals to records and prevent spoofing.

features.name: Knowledge-Based Authentication (KBA)
features.description: Adds certainty with out-of-wallet challenge questions.

geographical_data.regulatory_compliance_areas: Worldwide, dynamically set age thresholds based on customer location.

references: FFEIC BSA/AML (Federal Financial Institutions Examination Council Bank Secrecy Act / Anti-Money Laundering)
